prompt: Create a meticulously detailed vertical composite studio photograph showing the life progression of the same female person from birth to mature adulthood, with all ages sharing the same recognizable identity, facial structure, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, and family resemblance. Canvas: portrait orientation, about 3:4, cinematic fine-art photography. Composition: arrange exactly 6 versions of the same person in a diagonal ascending timeline from the lower left foreground to the upper right background, each progressively larger and older, partially overlapping like a layered generational portrait. The 6 labeled stages must be: 1) “Newborn Baby (0 Months)” at the bottom left, swaddled in a soft white blanket and lying curled in a shallow nest-like wrap; 2) “Toddler (1–2 Years)” seated just above, wearing a navy-and-white striped long-sleeve shirt, curly dark hair, small bare legs visible; 3) “Cheerful School Kid (6–8 Years)” standing behind the toddler, wearing a navy polo shirt and carrying a pink backpack strap over one shoulder; 4) “Teenager (14–17 Years)” behind the school kid, with long dark hair, wearing a dark navy hoodie; 5) “College-Age Young Adult (20–30 Years)” behind and to the right, wearing a crisp white button-up blouse, confident neutral pose; 6) “Confident 57-Year-Old Adult (Adult)” tallest at the upper right, with long wavy salt-and-pepper hair, wearing a black blazer over a white collared shirt. Add small elegant white serif labels beside each figure on the left or near the corresponding head, matching the exact stage text above. Lighting and mood: dramatic Rembrandt-style studio light from the upper right, warm golden rim light on the right side, cool blue shadow tones on the left, soft haze and brown smoky atmosphere rising from the lower right. Background: painterly textured gradient backdrop transitioning from deep blue on the left to warm amber-brown on the right, with subtle vignette. Faces should be visible, realistic, and consistent across ages, with natural skin texture and age-appropriate hair, proportions, and clothing. Use photorealistic detail, shallow depth of field, premium portrait retouching, no extra people, no watermark, no border, no additional text beyond the 6 labels.
